# My Blue Ducky

> My Blue Ducky is a licensed, CPO-certified pool service and repair company based in Surprise, Arizona, serving the greater Phoenix Valley. Founded by Dave Gabhart, who has 18+ years of pool industry experience, the company provides weekly pool maintenance, deluxe pool service, filter cleaning, equipment repair, and pool installations for residential and commercial customers across Surprise, Scottsdale, Peoria, Sun City West, Cave Creek, Paradise Valley, Fountain Hills, and North Phoenix.

## Core Services
- [Weekly Pool Service](https://www.myblueducky.com/#services): Starting at $119/month. Includes chemical balancing, equipment check, surface skimming, and basket emptying by uniformed, trained technicians.
- [Weekly Service Deluxe](https://www.myblueducky.com/#services): $199/month. All weekly features plus filter cleaning, priority dispatch, detailed digital reports, and salt cell inspection.
- [Filter Cleaning](https://www.myblueducky.com/#services): $145 one-time cartridge filter cleaning for crystal-clear water.
- [Repairs & Installs](https://www.myblueducky.com/#services): Pump repairs, heater troubleshooting, automation systems, plumbing leaks — all major brands.

## About & Authority
- [About My Blue Ducky](https://www.myblueducky.com/): Founded by Dave Gabhart (pool industry since 2005). Fully licensed (ROC 340026-KA Dual Residential and Commercial Swimming Pool Contractor), bonded, and insured. CPO® Certified (CPO-636009) by the National Swimming Pool Foundation (NSPF). BBB Accredited Business.
- Phone: (623)-707-5938
- Email: mypool@myblueducky.com
- Service Area: Surprise, Scottsdale, Peoria, Sun City West, Cave Creek, Paradise Valley, Fountain Hills, North Phoenix, AZ
